title: Record the image stream along with the path
body:
#### What this PR does / why we need it:

Records the original image stream, and not just the expanded path.

#### How to verify it

`podman machine list --format json`

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

Fixes #12089

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

Should this information be shown to the human as well ?

@ashley-cui
